question: Which occurred first, Phillips v. Martin Marietta Corp. or Roth v. United States? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: Phillips v. Martin Marietta Corp., 400 U.S. 542 (1971), was a United States Supreme Court case involving Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964.
1.subquestion: When did Phillips v. Martin Marietta Corp. occur?

2.fact: Roth v. United States, 354 U.S. 476 (1957), was a landmark case before the United States Supreme Court.
2.subquestion: When did Roth v. United States occur?

reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Phillips v. Martin Marietta Corp. occurred in 1971, while Roth v. United States occurred in 1957, so Roth v. United States occurred first. -> Roth v. United States
Final answer: Roth v. United States
